\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract base for Green\textquotesingle{}s function kernels. 

Responsibilities\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Store wavelength and wave numbers for homogeneous (k\+\_\+B) or layered (k\+\_\+L) media.
\item Provide a consistent polymorphic API for evaluating kernels and their RWG integrals.
\item Offer optional acceleration via an erfc lookup table (Ev\+Erfc).
\item Expose accuracy and periodic‑term switches used by some derived classes. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
